outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran war: UAE quits OPEC, Trump says Iran 'better get smart soon'
outlets.summary: Covers Trump's 'cry uncle' demand, Hegseth's hostile congressional hearing ($25B cost revealed), UAE OPEC exit, and Gaza flotilla interception. Focus on War Powers May 1 deadline.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: The Iran war now has a price tag ($25 billion), but still no end date
outlets.summary: Pentagon comptroller reveals $25B cost. Focus on munitions depletion (45% PrSM, 50% THAAD/Patriot). Democrats challenge Hegseth on nuclear contradiction.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran resists Trump's blockade and bombing campaign — war becoming 'endurance test'
outlets.summary: Analysis: Iran more capable of absorbing pressure than expected. War becoming endurance test. Frames Trump's 'cry uncle' as determination to see strategy through.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: Hegseth to Congress: Fund the Fight Now, or Fold on Iran
outlets.summary: Sympathetic coverage of Hegseth's combative hearing. Frames Democrats as undermining war effort. Highlights $200B supplemental request.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Pentagon chief Hegseth first public hearing on Iran war: Key takeaways
outlets.summary: Detailed analysis of Hegseth's contentious hearing. $25B cost, nuclear program contradiction, Garamendi patriotism attack. UAE OPEC exit analysis alongside.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Iran executed 21 people and arrested thousands since start of war, UN warns
outlets.summary: Humanitarian focus: UN rights chief condemns Iran's internal crackdown. 4,000+ arrested. Oil prices at $118 as humanitarian crisis deepens.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Israeli Navy begins to intercept Gaza flotilla located hundreds of miles from Israel
outlets.summary: Liveblog: Navy seizes 7 of 58 flotilla vessels near Crete. Netanyahu emergency consultations. Also covers Ford carrier departure and Hegseth hearing.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Trump Is Fed Up With the Iran War. He Could Still Renew It
outlets.summary: Analysis: Trump frustrated but 'cry uncle' stance means continued pressure. Hezbollah fiber-optic drones pose unsolved threat. IDF lacks counter.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: US Reaper drones destroyed; Russia condemns Israel strike near Bushehr
outlets.summary: State media highlights US military losses and Russian condemnation. Frames continued resistance as vindication. Downplays economic damage.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Did Araghchi's tour to Russia, Pakistan, Oman signal leverage or isolation?
outlets.summary: Analysis of Araghchi's diplomatic tour. Questions whether reaching out to India, Russia signals strength or desperation. Rial at record low.
